creator: aturetta@bestunion.it
text:
Martin Blapp wrote:
> 
> Hi Angelo,
> 
> Thanks for you work. I'm currently a bit
> short on time so I could only had a fast look
> at your changes.
> 
> Why does the patch remove pkg-plist-x11 ?
> 
> -- 
> Martin

First, it was wrong (as you see, the port was marked broken).

But the real reason is that difference between pkg-plist and 
pkg-plist-x11 is minimal and can be better satisfied with proper PLIST_SUB.

The port also used to manually install some files that are now correctly 
installed by the open-vm-tools makefile.

Thanks,
Angelo.
